_comment: Workflow DAG for the shared skill pipeline. Consumed by inject-learning-tail.py to bake each skill's closing next-step suggestion. Shape: skills[slug].next is an array of {skill, when} edges. Terminal skills have next: []. The injector validates that every slug in 'next' exists as a directory under claude-code-shared/skills/.

next.when: decisions are crisp and ready to capture
decisions are crisp and ready to capture
ready to implement without a formal PRD
want a richer PRD before tasking
PRD is approved and ready to break into tasks
all tasks are done and FU-001 cleanup is ready
want e2e coverage for the completed changes (optional)
all branches are done and FU-001 cleanup is ready
want e2e coverage for the completed changes (optional)
e2e tasks file is written and ready to implement
prototype confirmed the approach and ready to capture decisions
seed is verified and ready for implementation
tasks file is written and ready to execute fixes
build-code is done and FU-001 cleanup is ready
want e2e coverage after fixes land (optional)
tasks file is written and ready to execute
